common.searchHint: Search events, artists, venues, and cities
common.tonightEmpty: No shows today — check this week instead.
common.pwaInstallHint: Add to home screen for quick access to today's shows
common.pwaInstallIOSHint: Add to home screen for one-tap access
common.unclaimedArtistNotice: This page is based on public performance records. Artists are welcome to <claimLink>claim and edit</claimLink>.
common.socialPlaceholderHint: This musician hasn't claimed their page yet. Know them? Let them know they can set up their profile on JazzNode!
common.unclaimedVenueNotice: This page is maintained by JazzNode and has not been claimed by the venue.
common.artistsPageDescription: Browse jazz musicians, groups, and big bands from around the world.
common.eventsPageDescription: Discover upcoming jazz events, concerts, and jam sessions worldwide.
common.venuesPageDescription: Explore jazz venues and live music spots across the globe.
common.citiesPageDescription: Jazz scenes around the world — venues, artists, and events by city.
common.cityPageDescription: Discover jazz venues, events, and artists in {city}.
common.manifesto: Mapping the city's heartbeat, one note at a time.
common.manifestoL1: Good jazz doesn't need overpackaging — it needs to be heard.
common.manifestoL2: In an era where algorithms drown out authentic sound, JazzNode chooses to amplify those who focus on the essence of music.
common.manifestoL3: We don't chase glossy commercial lineups — we navigate the real sessions tucked in bar corners, brimming with soul and improvisational spark.
common.manifestoL4: This is an underground jazz guide, built for those who truly know good music.
common.collaborationGraphHint: Drag nodes to rearrange · scroll to zoom · line thickness = collaboration frequency
common.messageArtistDisabled: Know this artist? Invite them to claim their page to unlock direct messaging.
common.messageArtistDisabledLabel: Messaging unavailable — artist has not claimed their page
common.messageVenueDisabled: Know this venue? Invite them to claim their page to unlock direct messaging.
common.messageVenueDisabledLabel: Messaging unavailable — venue has not claimed their page
common.stayConnectedDesc: Follow this venue to get notified about upcoming shows and announcements.
common.magazineSubtitle: Stories, interviews, and deep dives into the world of live jazz across Asia.
common.magazineEmpty: No articles published yet. Stay tuned.
common.premiumComingSoon: Premium is coming soon — stay tuned!
common.newEventsPageDescription: Browse recently added jazz events from scraper updates.

auth.checkEmailMessage:
We sent a confirmation link to your email.
Please click the link to activate your account.
auth.emailInUse: This email is already registered. If you signed in with Google, you can <setPassword>set a password</setPassword> to enable email login.

auth.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait 60 seconds before trying again.
auth.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.resetEmailSentMessage:
We sent a password reset link to your email.
Please check your inbox and click the link to set a new password.
auth.passwordUpdated: Your new password has been set successfully.

adminHQ.tierConfigHint: Click on a tier cell to set the minimum tier required to unlock that feature. Green = unlocked, X = locked. Click Elite again when it's the minimum to hide the feature entirely. Changes take effect after saving.
adminHQ.lockBehaviorDesc: When a feature is locked, users at lower tiers will see the corresponding upgrade prompt.

tiers.metaDescription: Compare JazzNode tier plans for artists and venues. From free listings to premium tools — find the right fit for your jazz career.
tiers.heroSubtitle: Whether you're an artist or a venue, JazzNode grows with you. Compare plans and find the right tier for your jazz journey.
tiers.artistSectionDesc: Your profile is already live and complete for fans. Tiers unlock creator tools — edit your page, reach your followers, and build your brand.
